overview: Wallet Constellations is a live, single-page web app for visualizing ICP and ICRC token wallet transactions as interactive force-directed network graphs. Users can search any ICP wallet, explore connections, compare two wallets side by side, and see detailed stats — all without any login or backend dependency.
features: Force-directed network graph visualization of ICP wallet transaction history
Support for ICP and all 62 ICRC tokens from ICPSwap (CHAT, ckBTC, ckETH, GOLDAO, etc.)
Wallet comparison mode: side-by-side graphs with shared counterparty highlighting
Shared counterparties panel and comparison stats with token portfolios and activity sparklines
Node identity badges for SNS, DEX, and known project canisters
Device-local node labeling (max 6 chars, pencil icon on hover)
Search history dropdown and breadcrumb navigation
Zoom/pan following cursor and pinch point, with +/- buttons
Cluster collapse, mini-map, and whale detection for large networks
Copy address button and share link (URL pre-filled with address)
Activity sparklines, net flow summary, and whale highlighting per node
Fully frontend-only — all data fetched client-side, no login required
